name: runtime_rooted
description: Per-root runtime event — one row per (slot, block_id) emitted at the end of advance_published_root() in the replay tile, after all sub-advances (accdb, txncache, sched, banks, progcache, reasm) complete.  Captures the new root identity, the prior root on this lineage, the stake-total snapshot at the root (with the prior-root snapshot for free deltas), the stake delegations applied at this root (upserts + removes), program-cache fork operations, pool occupancy + pool-prune deltas, and per-node timing for the root advance itself.

block_id.description: Canonical block_id of the new root (32 bytes) — primary key part

parent_slot.description: Slot of the parent block of the new root

epoch.description: Epoch the new root belongs to

epoch_boundary_root.description: 1 if old_root.epoch != new_root.epoch (fd_bank_apply_deltas branch in fd_bank.c) — this root advance also materialized the per-epoch stake_delegations totals and reset new_votes root.  0 for intra-epoch root advances.

prev_root_slot.description: Slot of the prior root on this lineage (the old_root captured before this advance)

new_root_fork_idx.description: stake_delegations / vote_stakes fork_idx of the new root after the advance — cross-ref against runtime_epoch's per-fork queries

total_effective_stake_prev.description: total_effective_stake at the prior root on this lineage (lamports)

last_rooted_slot_prev_epoch.description: Last slot rooted in the previous epoch on this lineage.  Populated when epoch_boundary_root=1, else 0.

vote_stakes_root_idx_cnt.description: Number of live index_ele entries on the new root's vote_stakes fork (post-prune)

banks_pool_used.description: fd_banks_pool_used_cnt(banks) after pruning the non-root subtree

accdb_index_used.description: fd_accdb index element count after publishing root txn

progcache_index_used.description: fd_progcache index element count after the root advance

sched_pool_used.description: Scheduler block-pool element count after subtree_prune

top_votes_cnt.description: fd_top_votes entry count after any pruning at this root

banks_pruned_count.description: Banks evicted from the bank pool during this root advance (non-root subtree pruning).  Strong fork-divergence canary — non-zero means equivocation/competing forks existed.

sched_subtree_pruned_count.description: Scheduler pool elements released during subtree_prune at this root

vote_stakes_evicted_count.description: vote_stakes index_ele entries removed at root (zero-refcount removals after non-root forks were dropped)

funk_siblings_cancelled.description: accdb sibling txns cancelled during the root advance

progcache_siblings_cancelled.description: progcache sibling txns cancelled during the root advance

root_advance_started_ns.description: fd_log_wallclock() at the start of advance_published_root() (per-node)

root_advance_completed_ns.description: fd_log_wallclock() at the end of advance_published_root() (per-node)

transition_at_ns.description: fd_log_wallclock() at emit (nanoseconds since epoch).  Per-node operational.

transition_source.description: How this node observed the root advance

snapshot_load.description: Loaded from a snapshot that already advanced to this root

stake_delegations_upserts.description: Stake delegations upserted into the stake_delegations cache during this root advance (from fd_stake_delegations_apply_fork_delta).  Truncated to FD_CAPTURE_RUNTIME_ROOTED_STAKE_UPSERTS_MAX entries.

voter_pubkey.description: Voter (vote account) the delegation points at (32 bytes)

deactivation_epoch.description: Epoch the delegation deactivates in (u64::MAX if active)

stake_delegations_removes.description: Stake delegations removed from the stake_delegations cache during this root advance.  Truncated to FD_CAPTURE_RUNTIME_ROOTED_STAKE_REMOVES_MAX entries.

program_cache_updates.description: Program cache fork operations during fd_progcache_advance_root — children promoted to the new root, sibling chains cancelled.  Truncated to FD_CAPTURE_RUNTIME_ROOTED_PROGCACHE_MAX entries.

kind.description: Which fork operation hit this program

Promoted.description: Program txn promoted as the new root's child

Cancelled.description: Program txn cancelled as a non-root sibling

slot_loaded.description: Slot the program was originally loaded/verified at
